items.title: LQDW: A 17% Yield Is Possible Only With A Steep Capital Decay
items.description: LQDW offers a 17% yield via a covered call strategy on an investment-grade bond ETF. Click here to read why LQDW is a Sell.

items.title: Fidelity Dividend Growth Fund Q2 2025 Commentary
